name: finam
description: Finam Trade API plugin for Codex. Skills: finam:trade-api for real-time quotes, order book, OHLCV candles, portfolio and orders via REST, gRPC, and WebSocket; instrument search and volatility scanning; placing and cancelling orders through Finam broker; developing algorithmic trading scripts.

interface.shortDescription: Market data, orders, and algo trading through Finam broker.
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for working with Finam Trade API: accessing real-time quotes, order book, OHLCV candles, and trade history; searching and scanning instruments; managing portfolio and orders; placing and cancelling orders through Finam broker; developing and running algorithmic trading scripts via REST, gRPC, and WebSocket.
defaultPrompt: Show me the latest quotes for SBER@MISX.
Scan the most volatile Russian stocks today.
Write an algo trading script using Finam gRPC.
